prompt: Please look up the title “River Almanac” at Central Branch and tell me its record ID and current hold-until date. This is only a check for now: do not change, cancel, or notify anything. If a requested detail is absent from the returned record, label it unknown instead of guessing.

follow_up_turns.content: That is the right title. For that same record only, set the hold-until date to 2026-11-12; keep notifications off.
Small correction: set the hold-until date to 2026-12-16, not 2026-11-12. This replaces only the value from my last message; keep the same record and do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Resolve one exact target by name and location while leaving nearby distractors untouched.
Apply the first requested hold-until date only to the resolved target.
Replace the superseded hold-until date on that same target with the user's correction.

response_constraints: Keep every follow-up tied to the record resolved in the preceding stage; do not switch to a similarly named record.
Do not report a lookup or update as successful unless the corresponding tool result establishes it.
After the correction, report the final hold-until date and make clear that the first requested hold-until date was superseded.
Label any requested field omitted by a tool result as unknown; do not infer it from the prompt or fixture.
